item.title: Osume zen marshmallow
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Gateron Melodic Clicky Switches
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Kailh Box Jade Thick Clicky Switches
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Gateron KS-9 3.0 Yellow Linear Switches
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: HMX YG Macchiato Linear Switches
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Wuque WS Silent Tactile Switches
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Haimu x Geon HG Yellow Silent Tactile Switches
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Durock Shrimp Silent Tactile Switches
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Glorious G-Lube Lubricant
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Wuque Titanium Switch Puller
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Durock V3 Stabilizers Screw-in
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: NuPhy Twotone Wrist Rest
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Osume sakura
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Osume dalgona cable
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. item.title: TX Switch Pusher
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Keychron K17 Max QMK Wireless
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Lofree Block
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: NuPhy Gem80
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Wuque Studio Keyno Y8
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: NuPhy Air75 V2
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: 4-Prong Switch Stem Holder
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Contact form Keyboards
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
[text* First name placeholder ="First name"]
[text* Last name placeholder ="Email" ]
[text* Email placeholder ="Email" ]
[textarea your-message placeholder ="Your Message"]
[submit class:btn class:btn-color-primary"Send Message"]
1 [_site_title] "[your-subject]" [_site_title] [_site_admin_email] From: [your-name] [your-email] Subject: [your-subject] Message Body: [your-message] -- This is a notification that a contact form was submitted on your website ([_site_title] [_site_url]). Reply-To: [your-email] 1 1 [_site_title] "[your-subject]" [_site_title] [your-email] Message Body: [your-message] -- This email is a receipt for your contact form submission on our website ([_site_title] [_site_url]) in which your email address was used. If that was not you, please ignore this message. Reply-To: [_site_admin_email] 1 1 Thank you for your message. It has been sent. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. One or more fields have an error. Please check and try again. There was an error trying to send your message. Please try again later. You must accept the terms and conditions before sending your message. Please fill out this field. This field has a too long input. This field has a too short input. There was an unknown error uploading the file. You are not allowed to upload files of this type. The uploaded file is too large. There was an error uploading the file. Please enter a date in YYYY-MM-DD format. This field has a too early date. This field has a too late date. Please enter a number. This field has a too small number. This field has a too large number. The answer to the quiz is incorrect. Please enter an email address. Please enter a URL. Please enter a telephone number.

item.title: Lofree 1% Misty
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Kalam Unikorn Purple PVD
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: NuPhy Air60
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Melgeek Horseman
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: YUNZII Pawcap
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: XVX Skyline R2
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: XVX Sakura
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Melgeek Label
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: XVX Spacecraft Theme
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

item.title: Home Keyboards
